opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My hands and arms broke out in these weird bullseye spots this morning, and now they are spreading to my chest. They feel hot and burning.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly this morning and it's spreading fast from my hands up to my chest — I'm really frightened it's a serious allergic reaction or something going badly wrong.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 24 hours ago it started, and it flared up badly this morning — the spots first came up on the backs of my hands and wrists
symptom_narrative.duration: around a day; it seems to have peaked but it's spread from my hands and arms onto my chest
symptom_narrative.character: odd round 'bullseye' or target spots with rings of different colours; some have a dark, dusky, blistered-looking middle; the skin feels hot and burning with a bit of itch
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the burning and the way it's spreading is really frightening, but the spots themselves aren't very painful — it's more hot and prickly than sore
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: started on the backs of my hands and wrists on both sides, and now it's coming out on my chest
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came up over a day, worst this morning, and has been spreading upward from my hands
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: a cool cloth takes the heat out of it for a moment
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: warmth and the spots that are appearing on my chest make me more anxious
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I feel a bit off/run down but no high fever, no swelling of my face or lips, no trouble breathing, and no sores or ulcers in my mouth, eyes or private area
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had anything like these bullseye spots before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm managing everything normally, but I'm very anxious about how fast it's spreading

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I get cold sores on my lip from time to time

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I had a cold sore on my lip about 10 days ago that's now healing over; I haven't started any new medicines, antibiotics or painkillers recently

objective_data_offered.value: round target or 'bullseye' spots on the backs of both hands, wrists and forearms and now the front of my chest; a lot of them have three rings — a dark, dusky, slightly blistered centre, a paler puffy ring around that, and a red outer ring
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: described and shown by the patient over video; not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: it's fairly even on both arms and hands and has spread onto my chest; it's not just on one side
there's a healing crusted cold sore on the edge of my lower lip from about 10 days ago
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-shown over video; not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: alert and talking normally but visibly anxious and upset about the rash
I haven't taken my temperature but I don't feel hot or shivery — just a bit run down
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient impression only; no thermometer reading taken
